title: Implement Tickflow stale lease recovery
description: Use tickflow_lease metadata plus git worktree list to identify stale in_progress ticks, expired leases, missing worktrees, and dirty preserved worktrees. Add recovery decisions: continue, preserve/escalate, or release back to open only when safe.
acceptance_criteria: Expired leases are detected; recovery never deletes dirty work; safe abandoned claims can be released; recovery notes explain what happened and where preserved work lives.
